1.content: Okay, lets start with choices of chaning.
1.title: Start

13.content: Sounds good, here are open choices.
13.title: Gender Change

info.brief_description: One day you wake up to find your entire body has changed.
info.description:
Various stories about waking up one day to find your entire body has changed.

AR, AP, TG, and other things. Be creative, but keep it legal. Make sure to leave an option to branch off of, and one rule I will put in is the change is permanent. Your stories can also have many people who change as well, but if they do make sure its the same change as the main character of your story.
